items.briefing:
A recent ransomware attack on Canvas, used widely in education, raises questions relevant to Australian training organisations about whether paying ransoms actually protects stolen data — experts generally advise against it, as payment offers no guarantee data won't be misused or sold. Separately, Baidam and AUSCERT have signed a formal agreement to strengthen cybersecurity collaboration across Australia, which may benefit the broader education and training sector through improved threat intelligence and support.

Snowflake has also received Australian government security approval (IRAP) hosted through Google Cloud's Melbourne region, making it easier for local organisations to use cloud data services compliantly.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses a learning management system like Canvas, ensure you have recent data backups stored separately — this limits your exposure if a ransomware attack ever affects your provider.
